src_embedding_text: source: design test case id: tc-utente-001 title: user registration and login module: utente source files or pages: 2 covered methods: preconditions: test data: - username: testuser - password: testpassword - email: test@example.com - admin: false - footprint_totale: "0 kg co2" - new password: newpassword - new email: newemail@example.com - new admin status: true - new footprint: "10 kg co2" - user is not registered in the database test steps: 1. user enters username, password, email, and sets admin status to false. 2. user submits the form to register. 3. application sends a request to the database to verify registration. 4. database responds with "not registered". 5. application sends the homepage to the user. 6. user logs out. 7. user attempts to log in with the same credentials. 8. application sends a request to the database to verify registration. 9. database responds with "registered". 10. application sends the homepage to the user. expected result: - user is successfully registered and logged in. - user can change their details and log out. unit: project:
